name: compliant_doc_citation
description: Happy path — LLM returns Compliant with a USD-numbered doc cited in the narrative. Pins the Step 2 LLM-accepted path: rule 8a/8b decline (no automatic-compliant / external-CSP triggers in cols K/J), tagged evidence is present (no Step 1.65 NC short-circuit), validator accepts a concrete narrative with a literal citation token that appears in the evidence bundle. Narrative uses 'examined', 'confirmed via', and 'documented in' — three of the validator's _AFFIRMING_PHRASES at engine/validator.py:43-60 — so classify_narrative returns COMPLIANCE_AFFIRMING (not AMBIGUOUS) and the status-narrative match passes on first attempt. Discovered during scaffold: a bare 'Per USDxxxx ...' narrative without an affirming verb triggers REQUIREMENT_RESTATEMENT/STATUS_NARRATIVE_MISMATCH and the orchestrator retries until the stub queue exhausts.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization identifies and selects the following types of information system accounts to support organizational missions/business functions.
ccis_row.procedures: Examine the account management plan and confirm account types are enumerated.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00099999 Example System Account Management Plan Rev B — enumerates privileged, service, and standard user account types and the approval workflow for each.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined USD00099999 Example System Account Management Plan Rev B; confirmed via section 3 that privileged, service, and standard account types are documented in the plan with approval workflows for each.
